Best Solar Panel Solution in Australia Designed for Your Home and Business

At OMC, we help Australians save money and the planet with smarter, more efficient solar power systems. Whether you’re a homeowner or a business, our SAA Accredited experts deliver reliable, long-lasting solar solutions tailored to your needs.

About us

Renewable Energy Service for a Better Tomorrow

At OMC, we believe that the future of energy is clean, renewable, and accessible to everyone. From residential rooftop panels to large-scale commercial systems, we provide complete solar solutions that reduce your energy costs and carbon footprint.

Why Choose OMC Solar

Powering Australia, Sustainably

System Design

Our engineers create a custom solar plan to maximise efficiency and savings.

Wind Turbines

We harness the power of wind to generate clean, renewable energy, reducing carbon emissions and supporting a sustainable future.

Installation & Setup

Our SAA-accredited team ensures a safe, seamless installation with precision and professionalism.

Quality Check & Activation

We thoroughly test and optimise your system to ensure peak performance from day one.

Ongoing Support

OMNC Group provides ongoing maintenance, warranty coverage, and performance monitoring for complete peace of mind.

Contact Us
WHY CHOOSE US

Benefits of Going Solar with OMC

Why Choose Solar Energy

‍

Save on Energy Bills

Reduce your electricity costs by up to 70% with efficient solar solutions.

Eco-Friendly Power

Lower your carbon footprint and contribute to a cleaner, greener future.

Increase Property Value

Solar-equipped homes often sell faster and at higher market value.

Energy Independence

Generate your own power and reduce reliance on the grid.

Government Incentives

Take advantage of available rebates and feed-in tariffs across Australia.
